requirement_topic.en: Horizontal Battery / Hazardous-Substance Regime — Ecuador vs EU Battery Regulation
requirement_topic.zh: 横向电池/有害物质制度——厄瓜多尔对照欧盟电池法规
requirement_topic.zht: 橫向電池/有害物質制度——厄瓜多爾對照歐盟電池法規

summary.en: Ecuador does not have an EU-style horizontal battery regulation. There is no Ecuadorian equivalent of the EU Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 imposing a battery passport, QR-code labelling, carbon footprint declarations, recycled-content thresholds, or critical-mineral supply-chain due diligence on battery exporters. Battery compliance in Ecuador is instead handled product-by-product through the applicable RTE (Reglamento Tecnico Ecuatoriano) and the INEN Certificate of Conformity, which focus on safety and on accurate labelling of capacity, voltage and manufacturer rather than on a horizontal sustainability and circular-economy regime. Environmental handling of waste batteries is addressed through general environmental and waste-management rules administered by the environment authority, not through a producer battery passport.
summary.zh: 厄瓜多尔没有欧盟式的横向电池法规。厄瓜多尔不存在等同于欧盟电池法规（EU）2023/1542的制度，即不对电池出口商施加电池护照、二维码标签、碳足迹声明、再生材料含量门槛或关键矿产供应链尽职调查。厄瓜多尔的电池合规通过适用的RTE（厄瓜多尔技术法规）和INEN合格证书按产品逐一处理，重点在于安全以及容量、电压和制造商的准确标注，而非横向的可持续与循环经济制度。废旧电池的环境处理由环境主管部门依据一般环境与废弃物管理规则管理，而非通过生产者电池护照。
summary.zht: 厄瓜多爾沒有歐盟式的橫向電池法規。厄瓜多爾不存在等同於歐盟電池法規（EU）2023/1542的制度，即不對電池出口商施加電池護照、二維碼標籤、碳足跡聲明、再生材料含量門檻或關鍵礦產供應鏈盡職調查。厄瓜多爾的電池合規通過適用的RTE（厄瓜多爾技術法規）和INEN合格證書按產品逐一處理，重點在於安全以及容量、電壓和製造商的準確標註，而非橫向的可持續與循環經濟制度。廢舊電池的環境處理由環境主管部門依據一般環境與廢棄物管理規則管理，而非通過生產者電池護照。

standards_or_laws: No EU-style horizontal battery regulation in Ecuador — compliance is product-specific via applicable RTE INEN + INEN Certificate of Conformity
General environmental / waste-management rules administered by the Ministerio del Ambiente, Agua y Transicion Ecologica (waste batteries)

summary.en: China likewise has no single horizontal battery regulation equivalent to the EU model. Portable lithium battery packs for export are primarily subject to GB 31241-2022 (safety), customs import/export declaration, and CCC certification where a product falls within the CNCA catalogue. China's domestic producer-responsibility framework for waste batteries derives from the Solid Waste Pollution Prevention and Control Law and the 2021 Battery Recycling Management Measures, and applies domestically rather than to the destination market. Neither China nor Ecuador imposes a battery passport or critical-mineral due-diligence duty on exporters, so on this row the two regimes are broadly aligned in their absence of an EU-style horizontal regime.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有等同于欧盟模式的单一横向电池法规。出口便携式锂电池组主要受GB 31241-2022（安全）、海关进出口申报约束，落入CNCA目录的产品还须取得CCC认证。中国针对废旧电池的国内生产者责任框架源自《固体废物污染环境防治法》及2021年《废旧电池回收管理办法》，属国内适用而非面向目的地市场。中国与厄瓜多尔均不对出口商施加电池护照或关键矿产尽职调查义务，因此在本行上，两套制度在缺乏欧盟式横向制度方面大体一致。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有等同於歐盟模式的單一橫向電池法規。出口便攜式鋰電池組主要受GB 31241-2022（安全）、海關進出口申報約束，落入CNCA目錄的產品還須取得CCC認證。中國針對廢舊電池的國內生產者責任框架源自《固體廢物污染環境防治法》及2021年《廢舊電池回收管理辦法》，屬國內適用而非面向目的地市場。中國與厄瓜多爾均不對出口商施加電池護照或關鍵礦產盡職調查義務，因此在本行上，兩套制度在缺乏歐盟式橫向制度方面大體一致。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries (SAC/SAMR)
PRC Solid Waste Pollution Prevention and Control Law (2020 revision) — domestic EPR framework
MIIT/NDRC Battery Recycling Management Measures (2021) — domestic recycling obligations

gap.en: On this dimension the gap is the reverse of the EU case: Ecuador imposes NO battery-passport, carbon-footprint, recycled-content or critical-mineral due-diligence obligation, so Chinese exporters do not face an EU-style horizontal compliance burden for Ecuador. The practical obligation that remains is to identify whether the specific product is covered by an applicable RTE, obtain the INEN Certificate of Conformity, and ensure labelling (capacity, rated voltage, manufacturer/importer) is accurate and in Spanish. Exporters should not assume EU Battery Regulation deliverables are required for Ecuador, nor assume that absence of a horizontal law removes the RTE / Certificate of Conformity safety duty.
gap.zh: 在此维度上，差距与欧盟情形相反：厄瓜多尔不施加电池护照、碳足迹、再生含量或关键矿产尽职调查义务，因此中国出口商对厄瓜多尔不面临欧盟式横向合规负担。仍然存在的实际义务是确认具体产品是否被适用的RTE覆盖、取得INEN合格证书，并确保标签（容量、额定电压、制造商/进口商）准确且为西班牙文。出口商不应假定厄瓜多尔需要欧盟电池法规的交付物，也不应假定缺乏横向法律即免除RTE/合格证书安全义务。
gap.zht: 在此維度上，差距與歐盟情形相反：厄瓜多爾不施加電池護照、碳足跡、再生含量或關鍵礦產盡職調查義務，因此中國出口商對厄瓜多爾不面臨歐盟式橫向合規負擔。仍然存在的實際義務是確認具體產品是否被適用的RTE覆蓋、取得INEN合格證書，並確保標籤（容量、額定電壓、製造商/進口商）準確且為西班牙文。出口商不應假定厄瓜多爾需要歐盟電池法規的交付物，也不應假定缺乏橫向法律即免除RTE/合格證書安全義務。

mandatory_status.target: No equivalent horizontal regime — Ecuador imposes no EU-style battery passport / carbon footprint / due-diligence duty; mandatory obligations are limited to the applicable RTE and INEN Certificate of Conformity plus general environmental rules
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable in equivalent form — no horizontal battery regulation for exporters; GB 31241 safety and customs declaration are the domestic export requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Unlike the EU, Ecuador has no horizontal battery regulation, so the EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542 deliverables (battery passport, carbon footprint, recycled content, critical-mineral due diligence) are not required for Ecuadorian market access. The honest mapping of the EU battery-regulation row to Ecuador is that this obligation largely does not exist; the live compliance burden is the applicable RTE, the INEN Certificate of Conformity, and accurate Spanish labelling. Exporters should confirm RTE scope rather than build EU-style sustainability documentation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 与欧盟不同，厄瓜多尔没有横向电池法规，因此欧盟电池法规2023/1542的交付物（电池护照、碳足迹、再生含量、关键矿产尽职调查）并非厄瓜多尔市场准入所需。将欧盟电池法规行如实映射到厄瓜多尔，即该义务在很大程度上不存在；现实合规负担是适用的RTE、INEN合格证书及准确的西班牙文标签。出口商应确认RTE适用范围，而非构建欧盟式可持续性文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 與歐盟不同，厄瓜多爾沒有橫向電池法規，因此歐盟電池法規2023/1542的交付物（電池護照、碳足跡、再生含量、關鍵礦產盡職調查）並非厄瓜多爾市場准入所需。將歐盟電池法規行如實映射到厄瓜多爾，即該義務在很大程度上不存在；現實合規負擔是適用的RTE、INEN合格證書及準確的西班牙文標籤。出口商應確認RTE適用範圍，而非構建歐盟式可持續性文件。

source.publisher: Servicio Ecuatoriano de Normalizacion (INEN) — Reglamentos Tecnicos Ecuatorianos
